parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO s_notion.pages (id, database_id, title, content, url, created_time, last_edited_time, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  '{{ $json.database_id }}',
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.url }}',
  '{{ $json.created_time }}',
  '{{ $json.last_edited_time }}',
  0
)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  title = EXCLUDED.title, 
  content = EXCLUDED.content,
  last_edited_time = EXCLUDED.last_edited_time
RETURNING id;

=INSERT INTO s_notion.databases_monitored (database_id, name, active)
VALUES ('{{ $json.database_id }}', '{{ $json.name }}', true)
ON CONFLICT (database_id) 
DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, active = true;
